---
description: POC kickstart — generate a consumer guide with seed features from a project idea
---

## Overview

Transform a project idea into a sequenced consumer guide with 6-10 seed features ready for the AOD lifecycle. Three interactive stages: Idea Intake → Stack Selection → Guide Generation.

## User Input

```text
$ARGUMENTS
```

## Execution

Invoke the `~aod-kickstart` skill via the Skill tool. Pass any user arguments through.
